data.title: Yesterday, Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of US$47 million, and Mini BTC had a net inflow of US$6.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Farside Investors data, Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of 47 million US dollars yesterday, and Mini BTC had a net inflow of 6.5 million US dollars. Grayscale ETHE and Mini ETH had a net inflow and outflow of 0.

data.title: Bitcoin network transaction volume drops to near 12-month low, down 55% from peak
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Data shows that the 7-day moving average of Bitcoin network transactions has dropped to 330,000, hovering near a 12-month low, a sharp drop of 55% from the peak of 730,000 transactions in the network's history.
The fees generated by Runes in the past 30 days have dropped to less than $20,000, while the fees generated by Runes on the day of its release were $60 million. This shows that the market has shifted speculative trading activities to other blockchain ecosystems. (The Block)
According to Memepool data, the current Bitcoin network transaction fee is temporarily reported at 3 Sats/s.

data.title: Tether is actively communicating with US lawmakers on the stablecoin regulatory bill, which may be signed into law by Trump in April
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that Tether is working with US lawmakers to influence the way the United States regulates fiat currencies. Previously, as the issuer of the world's largest stablecoin USDT, Tether has been controversial for its alleged lack of transparency. Critics say the company has never been fully audited, but instead chooses to have quarterly financial book assessments provided by accounting firm BDO. As Congress works to establish a regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino said the company is actively communicating with lawmakers to promote relevant bills and promises to comply with the laws that are ultimately passed. The House of Representatives and the Senate are pushing for the bill to be signed into law by President Trump in April. If passed, Tether will be required to undergo monthly audits by US accounting firms and maintain a one-to-one reserve with regulatory-approved assets.

data.title: Ark Experiences Significant Net Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 15, monitoring by Farside Investors revealed that ARK's ARKB fund experienced a net outflow of $13.2 million the previous day.

data.title: Tether Collaborates With U.S. Lawmakers On Stablecoin Regulation
data.description:
According to PANews, Tether, the issuer of the world's largest stablecoin USDT, is actively working with U.S. lawmakers to influence the regulatory approach towards these fiat currencies. Tether has faced criticism for alleged lack of transparency, as it has never undergone a full audit, opting instead for quarterly financial assessments by global accounting firm BDO.

As Congress focuses on creating legislation to establish a regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has stated that the company is in active communication with lawmakers to support the proposed legislation and has pledged to comply with the laws once enacted. The legislation is expected to be signed into law by U.S. President Donald Trump as early as April. If passed, Tether will be required to undergo monthly audits by U.S. accounting firms and maintain a one-to-one reserve with regulator-approved assets.

data.title: Turbos: Launch Turbos.Fun Launch Frenzy event, token launch threshold reduced to 4000 SUI for two weeks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Sui's top ecological project Turbos announced the launch of the Turbos.Fun Launch Frenzy event for two weeks (February 13-27).
It is reported that this event will reduce the threshold for Meme coin projects to be launched through Turbos.Fun from 6000 SUI to 4000 SUI. Projects that pass Bonding Curve and go online on Turbos DEX during the corresponding period will receive platform exclusive rewards.
In addition, according to official disclosures, the platform has 50 Meme coin projects that have successfully gone online and landed on Turbos DEX through bonding curve; nearly 4,000 Meme coin projects have been facilitated to conduct fair token launches through Bonding Curve.

data.title: Coinbase adds MORPHO and PYTH to its listing roadmap
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase will add Morpho Token (MORPHO) and Pyth Network (PYTH) to the coin listing roadmap.

data.title: LIBRA falls below 1 USDT, market value temporarily reported at US$920 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the price of LIBRA, the Meme coin launched by Argentine President Milei, fell below 1 USDT, temporarily reported at 0.92 USDT, and the market value was temporarily reported at 920 million US dollars.
Odaily reminds that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly and the market risk is huge. Investors are advised to participate with caution.
Earlier news, Argentine President Javier Milei announced the launch of the Meme coin LIBRA through his official X account and announced the contract address.
